title: verbascum × pseudolydium
intro: Verbascum × pseudolydium, a sterile hybrid plant derived from the Verbascum thapsus and Verbascum lychnitis species, is a flowering plant known for its large, showy yellow blooms and robust growth. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its mucilaginous properties, which make it useful for soothing irritated tissues and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Verbascum × pseudolydium include its ability to calm digestive issues, reduce respiratory congestion, and promote a restful night's sleep due to its sedative properties. In herbal preparations, Verbascum × pseudolydium can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
